$comment: OEM warranty import template. One row per COVERAGE (a program is the set of rows sharing oem_make + model + model_year range + country + powertrain). Every row must carry a real source before confidence_status can be set to 'verified'. Do NOT fabricate terms — leave source fields blank and confidence_status 'needs_review' until confirmed against the model-year warranty booklet.

rows.subtitle: Basic Vehicle Coverage
rows.description: Covers most vehicle systems and components.
rows.notes: Example row. Verify against the INFINITI 2026 warranty booklet before production.
